name: Telegram
shortDescription: Comprehensive Telegram Bot API integration for automated messaging, group management, and webhook handling. Enables full bot functionality including sending messages, media files, and location data, along with real-time event monitoring for building interactive bot workflows.

actions.name: Send Message
actions.description: Sends a text message to a specified chat, group, or channel.

actions.name: Send Photo
actions.description: Sends a photo to a specified chat, group, or channel with optional caption.

actions.name: Send Document
actions.description: Sends a general file (document) to a specified chat, group, or channel.

actions.name: Get Chat Info
actions.description: Retrieves information about a chat, group, or channel.

actions.name: Get Chat Member
actions.description: Retrieves information about a member of a chat, group, or channel.

actions.name: Get Bot Info
actions.description: Retrieves basic information about the bot.

actions.name: Get Updates
actions.description: Retrieves incoming updates for the bot (messages, callbacks, etc.).

actions.name: Get Webhook Info
actions.description: Retrieves current webhook status and information.

actions.name: Edit Message Text
actions.description: Edits text and formatting of a message sent by the bot.

actions.name: Delete Message
actions.description: Deletes a message, including service messages.

actions.name: Forward Message
actions.description: Forwards messages of any kind from one chat to another.

actions.name: Send Audio
actions.description: Sends audio files to a specified chat. Audio must be in MP3 or M4A format.

actions.name: Send Sticker
actions.description: Sends static .WEBP, animated .TGS, or video .WEBM stickers to a specified chat.

actions.name: Send Location
actions.description: Sends a point on the map to a specified chat.

actions.name: Get File
actions.description: Gets basic information about a file and prepares it for downloading.

idealUseCases: Building automated customer support and chatbots
Implementing notification and alert systems via Telegram
Managing groups and channels with automated moderation
Distributing news and content to multiple chats
Creating interactive bot workflows with commands and callbacks
Setting up real-time monitoring for messages and events
Automating file and media sharing processes
Collecting user feedback and engagement data
